zh.lifeSummary: John Conley是Thomas Conley的兒子，於1561年10月19日在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可受洗。他於1599年5月27日與Dorothy Cliffe在英國肯特比登登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特維特沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Conley是Thomas Conley的儿子，于1561年10月19日在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可受洗。他于1599年5月27日与Dorothy Cliffe在英国肯特比登登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰肯特維特沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Conley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Down, Antrim, and Louth): shortened form of   Connolly  .

variants.name: Connolly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Bridie, Seamus, Aidan, Dermot, Eamon, Patrick Joseph, Colm, Cormac, Declan, Eoin.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Conghaile ‘descendant of Conghal’, a name meaning ‘hound valiant’, or of Ó Conghalaigh ‘descendant of Conghalach’, a derivative of Conghal; the two surnames have long been confused. Anglicized Irish forms Conneely, Connealy, Cunneely have arisen where loss of gh has caused lengthening of the second syllable of Conghal: they often also (Connacht) represent shortened forms of McNeilly from Mac Conghaile. Another possible origin is the West Cork name Mac Coingheallaigh (or Ó Coingheallaigh) ‘son (or descendant) of Coingheallach’, a personal name meaning ‘faithful to pledges’. See McNeilly .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Conley was christened on 19 October 1561, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas Conley. He married Dorothy Cliffe on 27 May 1599, in Biddenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He was buried in Wittersham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Conley a été baptisé le 19 octobre 1561, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas Conley. Il a épousé Dorothy Cliffe le 27 mai 1599, à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Ilenterré à Wittersham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: John Conley wurde am 19. Oktober 1561 in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Thomas Conley getauft. Er hat am 27. Mai 1599 in Biddenden, Kent, England Dorothy Cliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Wittersham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Conley è stato battezzato il 19 ottobre 1561 nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Thomas Conley. Lui sposato Dorothy Cliffe il 27 maggio 1599, nel Biddenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolto a Wittersham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Conleyは1561年10月19日にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークでThomas Conleyの息子として洗礼を受けた。1599年5月27日にイギリスケントビッドエンデンでDorothy Cliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスケントウィッテルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Conley(은)는 1561년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Thomas Conley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1599년 5월 27일 영국 켄트 비데든에서 Dorothy Cliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 윗터샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Conley foi batizado em 19 de outubro de 1561, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas Conley. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Cliffe em 27 de maio de 1599, em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele foi sepultado em Wittersham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Conley был крещен 19 октября 1561 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Thomas Conley. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Cliffe 27 мая 1599 г. в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он был похоронен в местности виттиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
